name: FireSale
description: Random flash-sale shop phase: occasionally a shop becomes a FIRE SALE - everything 90% off, 3 free rerolls, and a 30 second countdown before prices snap back up.

chance_percent.title: Trigger Chance (%)
chance_percent.description: Chance each shop opening becomes a Fire Sale (0 disables).

duration_seconds.title: Sale Duration (seconds)
duration_seconds.description: How long the Fire Sale lasts before prices revert.

discount_percent.title: Discount (%)
discount_percent.description: How much off everything during the sale (90 = 90% off).

free_rerolls.title: Free Rerolls
free_rerolls.description: Number of free rerolls granted for the duration of the sale.

min_wave.title: Minimum Wave
min_wave.description: Earliest wave a Fire Sale can trigger.

sfx_enabled.title: Sound Effects
sfx_enabled.description: Play the trigger sting and countdown ticks.

particles_enabled.title: Particles
particles_enabled.description: Show coin-burst particles during the sale.

intro_flourish_enabled.title: Intro Flourish
intro_flourish_enabled.description: Play the flash + slam-in banner + shop shake when a sale starts.
